title: rubus trinovantium
intro: Rubus trinovantium, also known as the Triunom raspberry or the Triunovium raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Rubus. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus trinovantium include its ability to help with digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. The plant is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
